title: Creamy Midnight Lemon Stir-fry
description: A savory and creamy Indian dish that satisfies a midnight craving with the tang of unwaxed lemon, perfect for a dairy-free meal.
instructions: Wash the lemons and slice them into thin rounds. Use only the grated zest from each lemon.
Press tofu or silken tofu to remove excess liquid, then chop into small cubes.
In a large pot or wok, heat vegetable broth over medium heat. Add garam masala and turmeric powder; stir until fragrant.
Add sliced lemons, chopped garlic, and the cubed tofu. Stir everything together well.
Simmer for about 10 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves before serving.
